apply: Use the story to illustrate the concept of ' appearances vs reality'
Compare and contrast the characters of the story with those in other literary works
Apply the moral lessons from the story to real-life situations
analyze: Analyze the use of language and tone in the story to create a particular atmosphere
Examine the character development and motivation of the protagonist
Discuss the social commentary in the story and its relevance to the present day
remember: Recall the plot and characters of The Tale of Melon City
Identify the setting and time period of the story
Mention the role of the narrator in the story
understand: Explain the theme of the story in their own words
Describe the character traits of the protagonist and antagonist
Identify the symbolism used in the story

ncert_objectives: To understand the plot, characters, and theme of the story
To analyze the language, tone, and symbolism used in the story
To apply the moral lessons from the story to real-life situations
board_exam_objectives: To recall the plot and characters of the story
To explain the theme and character traits of the protagonist and antagonist
To use the story to illustrate the concept of 'appearances vs reality'
